questions.question: A client-server program is designed to allow the client to send the file name to the server, and the server sends back the contents of the requested file if present. Write down the protocol steps for this process. (6 marks)
What is the purpose of the 'SYN' packet in the client-server file transfer protocol? (4 marks)
Design a simple client-server program in C or C++ to transfer a file between two machines using TCP/IP protocol. Include the client and server code. (20 marks)
questions.hint: Provide a clear explanation of the program and its functionality
